title: 主题海报版式设计
description: A humorous 3D cartoon illustration of a therapy session in a cozy office. On the left, a {argument name="patient character" default="sad anthropomorphic avocado half missing its pit"} sits on a brown leather lounge chair
prompt_raw: A humorous 3D cartoon illustration of a therapy session in a cozy office. On the left, a {argument name="patient character" default="sad anthropomorphic avocado half missing its pit"} sits on a brown leather lounge chair, gesturing with its thin stick-like arms. A large speech bubble above it reads "{argument name="speech text" default="I just feel so empty inside"}". On the right, the therapist, an {argument name="therapist character" default="anthropomorphic silver spoon"}, sits in a green armchair, holding a yellow pencil and writing on a notepad labeled "NOTES". The room has warm lighting, a beige rug on a wooden floor, and a bookshelf with a tissue box and books, one titled "REFLECT LISTEN VALIDATE". On the left wall hangs a framed poster reading "{argument name="poster text" default="IT'S OKAY TO FEEL YOUR FEELINGS"}" with a small heart. On the right wall hangs a framed diploma reading "{argument name="diploma text" default="SPOON UNIVERSITY SCHOOL OF LISTENING & VALIDATION"}" featuring a small spoon illustration and a gold seal.
prompt_preview: A humorous 3D cartoon illustration of a therapy session in a cozy office. On the left, a {argument name="patient character" default="sad anthropomorphic avocado half missing its pit"} sits on a brown leather lounge chair
prompt_display_cn:
案例「patient character」属于海报/封面。这是一张海报/封面类案例，重点在主视觉、标题、情绪、构图和传播冲击力。适合改成活动海报、电影海报、专辑封面、产品发布海报、小红书封面或宣传 KV。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A humorous 3D cartoon 插画 of a therapy session in a cozy office. On the left, a 【patient 角色：sad anthropomorphic avocado half missing its pit】 sits on a brown leather lounge chair, gesturing with its thin stick-like arms. A large speech bubble above it reads "【speech text：I just feel so empty inside】". On the right, the therapist, an 【therapist 角色：anthropomorphic silver spoon】, sits in a green armchair, holding a yellow pencil and writing on a notepad labeled "NOTES". The room has warm 光线ing, a beige rug on a wooden floor, and a bookshelf with a tissue box and books, one 标题d "REFLECT LISTEN VALIDATE". On the left wall hangs a framed 海报 reading "【海报 text：IT'S OKAY TO FEEL YOUR FEELINGS】" with a small heart. On the right wall hangs a framed diploma reading "【diploma text：SPOON UNIVERSITY SCHOOL OF LISTENING & VALIDATION】" featuring a small spoon 插画 and a gold seal.
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的【海报/封面类型】。

主视觉：
画面中心是【主视觉对象】，呈现【动作/状态/姿态】，具有强烈视觉吸引力。

标题文字：
主标题写【主标题】，副标题写【副标题】。文字位置为【文字位置】，字体风格为【字体风格】，要求清晰可读。

画面风格：
整体采用【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】，光影为【光影效果】。

背景与元素：
背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【装饰元素/符号/纹理】，但不要抢夺主视觉。

构图要求：
采用【构图方式】，层次明确，适合远看抓眼、近看有细节。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布平台/使用场景】。
